title: How to set the Z rising height
description:
How to set the Z rising height

How to set the Z rising height

The default rising height during tracking abort is 10 mm. You can change the height in the following way.

Select
	 [Tools]-[Conveyor Tracking].

Select
	 the conveyor to configure.

Select
	 [Track Abort Line].

Set the
	 rising height and click the [Apply] button.

NOTE:  If the out of motion range error occurs while the hand rises, decrease the rising height.
